title: The Deuce of Spades
writer: Alfred W. Alley, Richard Andres, Edward Withers
actors: Charles Ray, Peggy Prevost, Lincoln Plumer
plot: Amos, a Boston beanery owner inherits a restaurant out West and goes out to make his fortune. Unfortunately, the local card sharps take his last dime and show him up for a tenderfoot. So Amos sets out to become a gunslinger.
